acceptance_criteria.given: .gitignore has been modified to add negation exception for docs/reference/ below the docs/* rule
acceptance_criteria.when: git check-ignore -q docs/reference/tmp-cleanup-convention.md is run AND git ls-files docs/reference/ | wc -l is run
acceptance_criteria.then: git check-ignore exits 1 (file is NOT ignored) AND wc -l returns exactly 12 (pre-existing file count; no scope creep)

acceptance_criteria.given: .gitignore rule at line 46 changed from logs/ to logs/* AND !logs/lifecycle.jsonl added below it AND logs/lifecycle.jsonl file created and git-added
acceptance_criteria.when: git check-ignore -q logs/lifecycle.jsonl AND git check-ignore -q logs/checkpoint.log AND git ls-files --error-unmatch logs/lifecycle.jsonl are run
acceptance_criteria.then: lifecycle.jsonl check exits 1 (NOT ignored) AND checkpoint.log check exits 0 (still ignored) AND error-unmatch exits 0 (file is tracked)

acceptance_criteria.when: diff <(tail -n +2 /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh) <(tail -n +2 scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh) is run AND head -1 and stat -c %a are checked
acceptance_criteria.then: diff exits 0 (lines 2..EOF are identical; only shebang line differs) AND head -1 returns #!/usr/bin/env bash AND stat returns 755 AND git ls-files returns the file path

acceptance_criteria.given: scripts/score-update.sh has been modified to compute and append uncapped_delta AND a temporary mock scores file exists with ba score at 100
acceptance_criteria.when: score-update.sh --agent ba --event close_success_qa_pass --scores-file /tmp/test-scores.json is invoked on the temporary file
acceptance_criteria.then: appended history entry contains key uncapped_delta = 108 (100 + 8 = pre-clamp target; delta for ba/close_success_qa_pass is 8) AND new_score remains 100 (clamped) AND existing history entries are not rewritten AND ts/event/delta/old_score/new_score/note fields in history entries are unchanged

check.notes: Test must use temporary file — NOT live agent-scores.json; patch is additive-only; trap EXIT INT TERM required if background process spawned per qa.md cleanup contract

acceptance_criteria.given: docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md and docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/ have been committed to git
acceptance_criteria.when: test -n "$(git log -1 --format=%H -- docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md)" AND git ls-files docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/ | grep -q . AND git diff --name-only HEAD^..HEAD are run
acceptance_criteria.then: log command exits 0 with non-empty SHA AND views grep exits 0 (views/ files are tracked) AND HEAD^..HEAD diff does NOT include unrelated docs/dev/*.json ticket files qa-report files or other cycle artifacts

expected: output contains only spec-20260520-221059.md and docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/ paths; no docs/dev/*.json, ticket-*.md, qa-report-*.json, or other unrelated artifacts
